title: Mildly Sweet Australian Vegetable Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Australian dish featuring a mix of colorful vegetables and a hint of tahini paste, perfect for a snack or light lunch. This plant-based dish is easy to make and fun to eat.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together tahini paste, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Add the cut vegetables to the bowl and toss to coat with the tahini mixture.
Thread the vegetables onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the vegetables are tender and lightly charred.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Let the skewers cool for a few minutes before serving to kids.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 24 hours.
